name: node-locate-path
title: node-locate-path
summary: Get the first path that exists on disk of multiple paths
description:
Get the first path that exists on disk of multiple paths
Node.js module to get the first path that exists on disk, from
an array of multiple possible paths.
.
Provides a synchronous version and an asynchronous version (that
returns a promise).
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-locate-path because Get the first path that exists on disk of multiple paths.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-locate-path as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-locate-path with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-locate-path --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
